name: Chih Lien Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Chih Lien Industrial Co., Ltd. produces and supplies steel wires and steel bars in Taiwan and internationally. It offers high and low carbon, free cutting, bearing, alloy, spring, and cold heading steel wires; and free cutting, carbon, tool, alloy, spring, and stainless steel bars. The company provides its products for use in industrial machinery, precision parts, bicycles, motorcycles, automobiles, tools, household products, electronics, OA machines, springs, furniture, construction, etc. Chih Lien Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
